erddapDatasets.startHeadHtml5:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en-US">
        <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8">
        <title>ERDDAP</title>
        <link rel="shortcut icon" href="https://map.emodnet-physics.eu/platformpage/favicon.ico">
        <link href="https://ingestion-erddap.emodnet-physics.eu/erddap/images/erddap2.css" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
        <script>
        var _paq = _paq || [];
        /* tracker methods like "setCustomDimension" should be called before "trackPageView" */
        _paq.push(["setDocumentTitle", document.domain + "/" + document.title]);
        _paq.push(["setCookieDomain", "*.www.emodnet-physics.eu"]);
        _paq.push(["setDomains", ["*.www.emodnet-physics.eu"]]);
        _paq.push(['setCustomUrl', location.href.toLowerCase()]);
        _paq.push(['trackPageView']);
        _paq.push(['enableLinkTracking']);
        (function() {
            var u="//piwik.vliz.be/";
            _paq.push(['setTrackerUrl', u+'piwik.php']);
            _paq.push(['setSiteId', '25']);
            var d=document, g=d.createElement('script'), s=d.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];
            g.type='text/javascript'; g.async=true; g.defer=true; g.src=u+'piwik.js'; s.parentNode.insertBefore(g,s);
        })();
        </script>
erddapDatasets.startBodyHtml5:
EMODnet Ingestion - Physics ERDDAP
&EasierAccessToScientificData; 		log in|&language;  
&BroughtToYouBy; EMODnet Ingestion
erddapDatasets.theShortDescriptionHtml:
ERDDAP

ERDDAP is a data server that gives you a simple, consistent way to download subsets of scientific datasets in common file formats and make graphs and maps. This particular ERDDAP installation has oceanographic data (for example, data from satellites and buoys). [standardShortDescriptionHtml]

addAttributes.att: UNIGE - Collection of Current TimeSeries - IN SITU MultiPointTimeSeriesObservation
asSIstenza alla Navigazione per lâAccesso ai Porti in Sicurezza

SINAPSI is an Interreg Italy-France Maritime 2014-2020 Program - Priority axis 2 Protection and enhancement of natural and cultural resources and risk management, founded by the European Regional Development Fund.

INGV - Reprocessed of XBT dataset in the Ligurian and Thyrrenian seas (1999-2019)
INGV - Reprocessed of XBT dataset in the Ligurian and Thyrrenian seas (1999-2019) - METADATA
NAUTILOS - Collection of Sea Mammals Profiles
VOLVO OCEAN RACE - Collection of Meterological TimeSeries 2017-2018
MOANA PROJECT - Collection of Temperture Profiles
VOTO - Collection of Light backscattering (BACKSCATTERING) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of Surface incoming photosynthetic active radiation (LGH4) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of dissolved oxygen (DOXY) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of electrical conductivity (CNDC) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of practical salinity (PSAL) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of sea density (sigma-theta) (DENS) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of sea potential temperature (POTENTIAL_TEMP) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of sea temperature (TEMP) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of sea temperature from oxygen sensor (TEMP_DOXY) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of sea temperature, practical salinity (PSAL_TEMP) Profiles
VOTO - Collection of total chlorophyll (CHLT) Profiles
UNIGE - MEDA 2 - in situ current in the water column - MO ADCP
UNIGE - MEDA 2 - in situ wave in the water column - MO ADCP
UNIGE - MEDA 2 - in situ wather station in the water column - MO ADCP
UNIGE - MEDA 2 - in situ CTD data - CTD
EUSKOOS - BERMEO TG - in situ Tide Gauge sea level statio
EUSKOOS - PASAIA TG - in situ Tide Gauge sea level statio

acc, ACC_DATA_X, ACC_DATA_Y, ACC_DATA_Z, airtemp, atmosphere, atmospheric, celcius, compass, course, data, direction, earth, Earth Science > Atmosphere > Atmospheric Winds > Surface Winds, gill, GILL_AIRTEMP_CELCIUS, GILL_COMPASS_DEG, GILL_HUMIDITY, GILL_PRESSURE_HPA, GILL_WIND_DIR_ADJUSTED_DEG, GILL_WIND_SPEED_KNOT, global, gps, GPS_COURSE_DEG, GPS_LAT, GPS_LONG, GPS_VELOCITY_KNOT, GPS_Z, gyro, GYRO_DATA_X, GYRO_DATA_Y, GYRO_DATA_Z, heading, hpa, hull, HULL_SST_CELCIUS, humidity, imu, IMU_HEADING_DEG, IMU_PITCH_DEG, IMU_ROLL_DEG, keel, KEEL_SST_CELCIUS, knot, local, long, mag, MAG_DATA_X, MAG_DATA_Y, MAG_DATA_Z, measured, MEASURED_HEADING_DEG, percent, pitch, positioning, pressure, roll, science, sea, source, speed, sst, surface, system, temperature, time, velocity, wind, wind_from_direction, wind_speed, winds

Data from a recent deployment of Oshen's devices in severe weather conditions with Dawn Harrison's team at The Met Office, in order for them to run a case study comparing our observations with model predictions for that location
wind from direction relative true north
Sea water pressure, equals 0 at sea-level

Wave data from a recent deployment of Oshen's devices in severe weather conditions with Dawn Harrison's team at The Met Office, in order for them to run a case study comparing our observations with model predictions for that location
wave period at spectral peak / peak period (Tp)

acquired, atlas, atlas scientific, conductivity, consortium, control, data, demo, demo-site, density, earth, Earth Science > Oceans > Salinity/Density > Conductivity, electrical, environmental monitoring, flag, identifier, izmit bay, latitude, longitude, measurements, mediation, ocean, oceans, photobioreactor, quality, quality_flag, rhe, rhe-mediation, salinity, science, scientific, sea, sea_water_electrical_conductivity, seadatanet, seawater, sensor data, sensors, serial, site, tds, time, total dissolved solids, turkey, turkey demo-site, ultraviolet, wastewater, water, water quality
time, latitude, longitude, serial, conductivity, QC

This dataset is part of the RHE-MEDiation project (Horizon Europe) and provides in-situ measurements of electrical conductivity using Atlas Scientific sensors at the Dilovas? Municipal Advanced Biological Wastewater Treatment Plant (WWTP), located in Izmit Bay, in the Northeastern Marmara Region, Turkey. The WWTP integrates biological and tertiary treatment processes including phosphorous removal and UltraViolet (UV) disinfection. The dataset support monitoring of effluent quality and the environmental performance of water treatment technologies in the industrially impacted Izmit Bay area.

This dataset is part of the RHE-MEDiation project (Horizon Europe) and provides in-situ measurements of Potential of Hydrogen using Atlas Scientific sensors at the Dilovas? Municipal Advanced Biological Wastewater Treatment Plant (WWTP), located in Izmit Bay, in the Northeastern Marmara Region, Turkey. The WWTP integrates biological and tertiary treatment processes including phosphorous removal and UltraViolet (UV) disinfection. The dataset support monitoring of effluent quality and the environmental performance of water treatment technologies in the industrially impacted Izmit Bay area.

time, latitude, longitude, serial, temperature, QC

This dataset is part of the RHE-MEDiation project (Horizon Europe) and provides in-situ measurements of water temperature using Dallas Semiconductor sensors at the Dilovas? Municipal Advanced Biological Wastewater Treatment Plant (WWTP), located in Izmit Bay, in the Northeastern Marmara Region, Turkey. The WWTP integrates biological and tertiary treatment processes including phosphorous removal and UltraViolet (UV) disinfection. The dataset support monitoring of effluent quality and the environmental performance of water treatment technologies in the industrially impacted Izmit Bay area.

Temperature profiles from Dive Log data. This collection is made available by DIE DEUTSCHE MEERESSTIFTUNG and SSI. The data is provided "as is," as collected by the diving computer

The dataset originates from measurements collected during the construction of the Gemini Wind Farm in the North Sea, located approximately 80 kilometers north of Schiermonnikoog.
